MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Advanced From Feb-24-16 To Oct-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-548206 WITH CASE CGC-15-547392
Off Calendar Dec-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ASHLEY HERSHBERGER'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-548206 WITH CASE CGC-15-547392 is Granted without prejudice to the Ngai parties requesting that the trial judge sever or bifurcate the claims for trial. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. The lead case is 547392 and all future filings must be in that case only. Good cause exists for consolidation to ensure that there is not duplicative discovery and because both cases arise out of Hershberger's tenancy at the 24th Avenue property. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Complaint - The matter is transferred to Department 501 to be heard on the same day, at the same time. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)

Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Demurrer To Complaint - The matter is transferred to Department 501 to be heard on the same day, at the same time. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.
=(302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Jadna Veledar, Esq., Esq., (415) 835-5900 of the Hooshmand Law Group for Plaintiff/Opposing party Ashley Hershberger.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and no oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JENNIFER NGAI's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint is DENIED. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Jadna Veledar, Esq., Esq., (415) 835-5900 of the Hooshmand Law Group for Plaintiff/Opposing party Ashley Hershberger.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and no oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JENNIFER NGAI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Moving party fails to cite any authority in the habitability/landlord-tenant context standing for the proposition that one who operates and manages the premises (Complaint paragraph 7) is not liable to tenants for failure to provide/maintain habitable premises. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
